description: You are an economist preparing food expenditure projections for households at three specific income levels using the food expenditure dataset (/home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/food.gdt). Estimate an OLS regression of food expenditure (food_exp) on weekly income (income). Extend the dataset to include three new observations with income values of 15, 20, and 25 ($100 units) and generate forecasts with 95% prediction intervals for these observations based on the model estimated from the original sample (observations 1-40). Save the execution script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/forecast_script.inp and the complete regression and forecast output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/forecast_results.txt.
